_comment: Standard raw colour ramps baked into @stapel/tokens (L1). This is the ONE place hex is born. Steps follow the 50–950 grid; values are theme-independent. A host adds custom ramps in its theme's `ramps` section (they merge on top of these). Ramps are NOT emitted as CSS custom properties — they are inlined into core-token definitions at generation time, so there is no `--stapel-raw-*` to reference (bypass closed by absence of API). Reachable in code only via the `@stapel/tokens/raw` subpath (theme-config + showcase; lint-guarded elsewhere).
